episodes.name: Hell Hath No Fury Like a Man Wronged!
episodes.overview: Ready to settle a score, big shot Abhimanyu Nayak arrives in Goa. Back in the past, Shiva’s reunion with his BFF gang ignites the chapter of love, lies and deceit.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/f0t0236v3kqi/gunaah-s01-e01-webrip-720p-hindi-aac-5-1-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Vendetta
episodes.overview: At the casino, Abhimanyu weighs in on his first move. Flashbacks reveal how a romantic date night draws Shiva into a deadly web as he gets framed for a murder.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/tt7mxybz2kk9/gunaah-s01-e02-webrip-720p-hindi-aac-5-1-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Tables Have Turned
episodes.overview: The aftereffects of his arrest leave Shiva reeling with frame-ups and betrayals. While Tara wrestles with painful memories of her own, Abhimanyu takes charge at the casino.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ze6r19x37e2g/gunaah-s01-e03-webrip-720p-hindi-aac-5-1-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: My Love Is Not a Lie
episodes.overview: With her son Kartik missing, a frail and frightened Tara begins the search.  A look into the past offers Tara’s side of the love story, unveiling disturbing secrets.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/24tw46qhqctr/gunaah-s01-e04-webrip-720p-hindi-aac-5-1-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: D-Day
episodes.overview: Armed with the ‘perfect heist’ plan, Michael, JK, and Tara brace for their next moves. Ahead of a charity event, Abhimanyu and Michael get into a heated confrontation.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/mns7gq6crbfr/gunaah-s01-e05-webrip-720p-hindi-aac-5-1-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Godfather
episodes.overview: While Shiva is left grilling in prison, his friends-turned-foes start anew after a successful heist. Amidst the uncertainty, Shiva finds his guiding light in the form of Bhau.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/t2zqx034nucq/gunaah-s01-e06-webrip-720p-hindi-aac-5-1-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Best Served Cold
episodes.overview: Conflicts of the past resurface as Abhimanyu and JK have a man-to-man conversation. Drowned in his sorrows, Shiva has one choice to make: give up or retaliate!
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/4gxjz7kf36xu/gunaah-s01-e07-webrip-720p-hindi-aac-5-1-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Reincarnation
episodes.overview: At Tara’s party, Abhimanyu concocts his plan of action. In the past, Bhau’s orchestrated mayhem offers Shiva a second chance at life - a rebirth!
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/05ui2y5pfagc/gunaah-s01-e08-webrip-720p-hindi-aac-5-1-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: We Are Family
episodes.overview: While Tara grows frantic about Divya’s deteriorating health, Abhimanyu reminisces the sufferings of his loved ones. At the prison, a plot to kill Bhau is set in motion.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/964y0k2r6c4t/gunaah-s01-e09-webrip-720p-hindi-aac-5-1-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: A Way Back Home
episodes.overview: Tension mounts between JK and the Ranes over reopening Shiva’s case. Back home, Abhimanyu finds solace in his father’s embrace. And now, he is all set for his next move!
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/586iv7i9c559/gunaah-s01-e10-webrip-720p-hindi-aac-5-1-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Is Love a Trap?
episodes.overview: Flashbacks reveal how love becomes a hurdle in Abhimanyu’s plan of vengeance. As he storms into Tara’s life again, the resolution for revenge is clear - one way or another!

episodes.name: The Loophole
episodes.overview: Looking for answers, Michael dredges up Abhimanyu’s close associate Rana’s story. While he aims to connect the dots, Abhimanyu forms an unlikely bond with Divya.

episodes.name: Men with a Past!
episodes.overview: While Abhimanyu and Rana deal with the ghosts of their past, Divya wrestles with her feelings of love. At the casino, Abhimanyu senses an opportunity to get back at Tara.

episodes.name: Of Lost Love and Vengeance
episodes.overview: Tension simmers as Abhimanyu pushes Tara to recall the past wounds. While Gargi senses a conspiracy, Abhimanyu answers a big question: What after revenge?

episodes.name: A Mother's Heart
episodes.overview: With Gargi’s arrival at the dinner party, Abhimanyu’s identity is at risk of disclosure. Following his hunch, Michael inches dangerously close to the truth.

episodes.name: Fate Is Blind

episodes.name: The Gameplan

episodes.name: Show of Power
episodes.overview: While Bhau guides Abhimanyu on his next plan of action, JK sets his sights on Abhimanyu’s hotel project. A deadly attack at Tara’s casino puts everyone on edge!

episodes.name: The Night I Met You Again
episodes.overview: After the casino attack, JK and Abhimanyu seek shelter at the old-yet-familiar Adda. Broken from within, Tara finds solace in a heart-to-heart talk with Abhimanyu.

episodes.name: Blood Ties
episodes.overview: Tara grows increasingly concerned when Michael claims to have killed her father. Back at the Rane house, Abhimanyu reminisces painful memories of the past.

episodes.name: Follow the Commander
episodes.overview: Abhimanyu keeps things platonic with Divya while Michael’s quest for the truth intensifies. Keeping Abhimanyu out of the loop, Bhau sets a new plan in motion.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/fmul8fhqyq03/gunaah-s01-e21-webrip-720p-hindi-aac-5-1-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Can I Get Over Her?
episodes.overview: JK overlooks Michael’s findings about Abhimanyu. Back at the casino, JK’s revelation about wanting a second child leaves Abhimanyu wrestling with pent-up feelings.

episodes.name: Innocent Love
episodes.overview: Michael presses on JK’s insecurity, sowing doubts about Kartik’s biological father. While Divya revels in new-found love, Abhimanyu must reconsider his immoral choices.

episodes.name: Cheaters Will Prosper
episodes.overview: DNA findings reveal the truth about Kartik’s parentage, leaving JK on edge. Ready to get back at Tara, Abhimanyu remains persistent about his love trap for Divya.

episodes.name: There Will Be Blood
episodes.overview: Using Divya as a pawn, Abhimanyu wrestles with a tough choice - act or retreat. Ahead of the D-day, an unexpected tragedy awaits everyone. And this may ruin it all!

episodes.name: Episodes 01 - 08
episodes.overview: Forging a business partnership with JK and Tara, Abhimanyu makes it clear - the vendetta will continue! Determined to unravel the conspiracy, Mert embarks on a quest of his own.
